glosses.hi: प्रतिनिधित्व करना; किसी की जगह करना
glosses.ja: 代表する; 代わりをする

translations.en: I can cover for Lara today.
translations.ko: 오늘 라라 대신 제가 맡을 수 있어요.
translations.he: אני יכול להחליף את לארה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi có thể làm thay Lara.
translations.ar: يمكنني أن أحلّ محلّ لارا اليوم.
translations.hu: Ma be tudok ugrani Lara helyett.
translations.hi: मैं आज लारा की जगह काम कर सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα μπορώ να καλύψω τη Λάρα.
translations.nb: Jeg kan vikariere for Lara i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku bisa menggantikan Lara.
translations.sv: Jag kan vikariera för Lara i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi pot să o înlocuiesc pe Lara.
translations.da: Jeg kan vikariere for Lara i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はララの代わりに私が入れます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1sg, present); occupies V2; selects a bare infinitive at clause end and expresses ability/possibility.
Proper name; accusative direct object of 'vertreten' (the person being represented).
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate (time: today).
Bare infinitive of the lexical verb selected by the modal; inseparable prefix verb meaning 'to represent/substitute for'.

sentences.target: Er darf uns beim Treffen vertreten.

translations.de: Er darf uns beim Treffen vertreten.
translations.en: He’s allowed to represent us at the meeting.
translations.es: Él puede representarnos en la reunión.
translations.fr: Il peut nous représenter à la réunion.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可以在会议上代表我们。
translations.yue: 佢可以喺個會度代表我哋。
translations.ru: Он может представлять нас на встрече.
translations.pt: Ele pode nos representar na reunião.
translations.vi: Anh ấy được phép đại diện cho chúng tôi trong cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Hij mag ons vertegenwoordigen tijdens de vergadering.
translations.uk: Він може представляти нас на зустрічі.
translations.hi: उसे बैठक में हमारी ओर से प्रतिनिधित्व करने की अनुमति है.
translations.pl: On może nas reprezentować na spotkaniu.
translations.el: Μπορεί να μας εκπροσωπήσει στη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Han har lov til å representere oss på møtet.
translations.id: Dia boleh mewakili kami dalam rapat.
translations.sv: Han får representera oss på mötet.
translations.ro: El are voie să ne reprezinte la ședință.
translations.da: Han må repræsentere os på mødet.
translations.ja: 彼は会議で私たちを代表できます。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (3sg, present); V2; grants permission and selects a bare infinitive.
1st person plural personal pronoun in accusative; direct object (the group being represented).
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); introduces a PP and governs the dative.
Common noun (neuter); dative singular as the object of 'bei'; denotes the event/location.
Bare infinitive of the lexical verb selected by the modal; clause-final.

sentences.target: Morgen soll ich die Chefin vertreten.

translations.de: Morgen soll ich die Chefin vertreten.
translations.en: Tomorrow I’m supposed to stand in for the boss.
translations.es: Mañana se supone que debo sustituir a la jefa.
translations.fr: Demain, je dois remplacer la patronne.
translations.ko: 내일은 사장님 대신 제가 맡기로 했어요.
translations.yue: 聽日我要幫女老細代班。
translations.he: מחר אני אמור למלא מקום של הבוסית.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi được giao đứng thay sếp.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن أحلّ محلّ المديرة غدًا.
translations.nl: Morgen moet ik de baas vervangen.
translations.hu: Holnap nekem kell helyettesítenem a főnöknőt.
translations.hi: कल मुझे बॉस की जगह काम करना है.
translations.el: Αύριο πρέπει να αντικαταστήσω τη διευθύντρια.
translations.nb: I morgen skal jeg vikariere for sjefen.
translations.sv: I morgon ska jag vikariera för chefen.
translations.ro: Mâine trebuie să o înlocuiesc pe șefă.
translations.da: I morgen skal jeg vikariere for chefen.
translations.fi: Huomenna minun on määrä sijaistaa pomoa.
translations.ja: 明日は上司の代行をすることになっています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed sentence-initially as a frame-setter (V2 triggers).
Finite modal auxiliary (1sg, present); V2; indicates obligation/expectation and selects a bare infinitive.
1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject following the finite verb (V2 order).
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Chefin'.
Common noun (feminine); accusative direct object of 'vertreten'.
Bare infinitive of the lexical verb selected by the modal; clause-final due to verbal brace.

sentences.target: Ich lasse mich von Nina vertreten.

translations.de: Ich lasse mich von Nina vertreten.
translations.en: I’m having Nina cover for me.
translations.ko: 니나가 제 일을 대신해 줄 거예요.
translations.vi: Tôi nhờ Nina làm thay cho tôi.
translations.nl: Ik laat Nina voor me invallen.
translations.ja: ニナに代わってもらいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite verb (1sg, present) with causative meaning; V2; takes a bare infinitive complement and a reflexive object.
Reflexive personal pronoun (1sg, accusative) coreferential with the subject; marks a medio-passive/causative construction ('sich vertreten lassen').
Preposition governing dative; introduces the agent phrase in a 'von'-PP.
Proper name; dative object of the preposition 'von'; agent performing the action.
Bare infinitive complement of 'lassen'; clause-final; inseparable prefix verb.

Ich lasse mich von Nina vertreten.

Morgen soll ich die Chefin vertreten.
Ich lasse mich von Nina vertreten.

He’s allowed to represent us at the meeting.
Tomorrow I’m supposed to stand in for the boss.
I’m having Nina cover for me.
